name: Metabase
description: Open source business intelligence and analytics platform. Create dashboards and explore data without writing SQL.
summary: Metabase is actively releasing frequent patch updates across multiple stable branches. The latest stable release is v0.59.5 (OSS) / v1.59.5 (Enterprise), released on April 2, 2025 (https://github.com/metabase/metabase/releases/tag/v0.59.5). A beta release of v0.60.0 was published on March 27, 2025, indicating active development of the next major version. Multiple older branches (54.x through 59.x) are receiving concurrent patch support, reflecting a mature release cadence. Detailed per-release changelogs are linked from each GitHub release page but were not included in the provided changelog text.

answers.What is the current license?: Open Source edition uses AGPL v3; Enterprise edition uses a commercial license
answers.Is the project actively maintained?: Yes — multiple releases across several branches in March–April 2025
answers.Is there a cloud-hosted version availabl: Yes — Metabase Cloud (managed cloud) is available at metabase.com
answers.Does it support SSO and SAML authenticat: Yes — SSO and SAML are supported in the Enterprise edition
answers.What databases/data sources are supporte: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, MongoDB, Presto, Druid, Oracle, Vertica, SparkSQL, and others via drivers

alternatives.name: Redash
alternatives.review: Open source, query-focused, simpler feature set.

alternatives.name: Apache Superset
alternatives.review: Apache-licensed, rich visualisation library, steeper setup curve.

alternatives.name: Grafana
alternatives.review: Primarily metrics/time-series but increasingly used for general BI.

alternatives.name: Hex
alternatives.review: Close source, enterprise focus, AI Analytics Platform for your whole team

alternatives.name: Tableau
alternatives.review: Tableau offers powerful and polished visualizations with enterprise support, but it is proprietary and significantly more expensive than Metabase.

alternatives.name: Lightdash
alternatives.review: Lightdash integrates tightly with dbt for a metrics-first BI experience, but has a smaller ecosystem and fewer connectors than Metabase.
